title: linum lignosum
intro: Linum lignosum, also known as Flax-leaved Linum, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the family Linaceae. It is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Linum lignosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Linum lignosum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
